headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'sha256-{HASH}' https://trusted-cdn.com https://formsubmit.co; style-src 'self' 'sha256-{HASH}' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: https://trusted-images.com https://fonts.gstatic.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; object-src 'none';
